matched_to: B2B travel agencies, tour operators, and event organizers seeking Moroccan expertise

leads.title: Founder, President & CEO
leads.headline: Owner, ID Travel Group
leads.company_address: 1875 Palmer Avenue Suite 209, Larchmont, NY 10538, US
leads.company_description: ID Travel Group is a luxury travel wholesaler and tour operator with offices in New York, London, Johannesburg, Singapore, and Melbourne. They serve the global market by providing elite hotels, resorts, villas, customized safaris, flights, transfers, and concierge services across Southern Europe, Africa, the Caribbean, the Indian Ocean, the Middle East, Southeast Asia, the South Pacific, Central America, Mexico, and the USA.

leads.title: President/CEO
leads.headline: President of Tradesco Tours
leads.company_address: 885 W Cross St, Woodland, California 95695, US
leads.company_description: Tradesco Tours is a family-owned tour operator serving North America since 1985 with specialized ground operations in Europe and Southern Africa. They provide personalized travel arrangements, including FIT packages, escorted tours, hotel reservations, local guides, cultural programs, and luxury safari itineraries. Their services cater to both private and group travelers through comprehensive logistics and local expertise.

leads.title: Founder | CEO
leads.headline: Founder | CEO
leads.company_address: 32 Elm Place, Suite 3N, Rye, New York 10580, US
leads.company_description: Voyage By Pascale is a boutique wholesale company based in the United States that serves the luxury travel advisor community. They act as a dedicated partner for advisors seeking to provide their discerning clients with unparalleled, high-end travel experiences. The company prioritizes professional integrity and strong relationships to deliver customized luxury solutions.

leads.title: Managing Director
leads.company_description: Entire Travel Group is an Australian family-owned wholesaler and tour operator founded in 1971. They curate and deliver unique holiday packages through global partnerships, emphasizing experience-backed itineraries and enhanced technology for customer service. The company serves the travel market by providing exclusive products and comprehensive holiday packages to a wide range of destinations.

leads.title: Managing Director & Founder
leads.headline: Managing Director & Founder at Travel Buddy UK
leads.company_description: Travel Buddy UK is a Bristol-based travel agency specializing in luxury and tailor-made holidays, with over 14 years of experience and ABTA/ATOL accreditation. Core offerings include luxury villa rentals, honeymoons, tailor-made package holidays, city breaks across Europe's capitals, and Mediterranean cruising. They serve UK travelers seeking unique, high-end experiences with personal service, expert advice, and 24/7 support.

leads.title: Founder, President & Visionary
leads.headline: Global Luxury Journey Designer, Entrepreneur, Industry Leader | Advisor | Serandipians | Destinations | Hotels | Rail | Experiences | Trade
leads.company: CTN Family of Brands | Custom Travel Network | Custom Train Journeys | African Voyager
leads.company_address: 30211 Avenida De Las Banderas, Suite 200, Rancho Santa Margarita, CA 92688, US
leads.company_description: CTN Family of Brands operates as a hybrid custom journey planner and wholesale tour operator for travel agents and industry partners. They provide tailored trip consulting and authentic travel experiences that move beyond traditional tourism. By acting as a sourcing partner, they deliver customized itineraries designed to meet the specific requirements of their clients.

leads.title: Co-founder & CFO
leads.headline: Co-founder & CFO
leads.company_description: Kaluah Tours is a wholesale travel distributor and tour operator that functions as a B2B intermediary for travel agencies and tour operators globally. They provide a wide range of services, including hotel accommodations, attraction tickets, car rentals, transportation, and cruises. The company facilitates these bookings through an online system designed for instant confirmation.

leads.title: Chief Executive Officer
leads.headline: CEO | Founder | Business Development  Executive | Travel Expert | Customized Travel Advisor | Assisting Clients to Travel Beyond Boundaries: Africa| Latin America | Mexico | SE Asia | Indonesia | New Zealand | Australia
leads.company_address: 7183 surfbird circle, carlsbad, ca, united states
leads.company_description: Latitude Expeditions is a United States-based custom travel company that designs bespoke trips for individual travelers. Operated by Shepro Travel Group, Inc., the firm focuses on personalized itinerary design rather than standardized package tours. Their process emphasizes direct consultation with clients to create unique, tailored travel experiences.

leads.title: Founder & Luxury Travel Consultant
leads.headline: Founder & Luxury Travel Consultant at Otherworldly Travel
leads.company_description: Otherworldly Travel by Sarah Casewit is a boutique luxury travel consultancy specializing in bespoke travel planning, founded by a Forbes-recognized expert with over 15 years of experience and Moroccan roots. Geographic specializations include Marrakech and the Atlas Mountains in Morocco, alongside Buenos Aires, Mallorca, and Kyoto. The firm curates culturally immersive private journeys with exclusive insider access — private riad dinners, after-hours UNESCO sites, and artisan conversations — for discerning clients seeking transformative, locally rooted experiences.

leads.title: Co-Owner & Travel Advisor
leads.headline: Co-Owner & Travel Advisor
leads.company_description: Red Letter Travel is a luxury travel agency and Virtuoso member operating as an independent affiliate of Brownell Travel. They provide comprehensive trip planning, custom itineraries, and white-glove concierge services for their clients. By leveraging on-ground partners, they ensure VIP treatment and exclusive perks throughout the travel experience.
